description: Make all 8 services production-startable and fix the 4 frontend apps without bundler configs. Wire services with proper health checks, graceful shutdown, and real connections. Add build configs to marketing, quantstatus, quanttube, status.
steps: 1. Fix apps/marketing - Add a proper build script. Currently package.json has 'build': 'tsc --noEmit' which produces no output. It's a React app that needs either Next.js or Vite config. Look at the src/ structure and add a minimal vite.config.ts with react plugin, update package.json build to use vite build.
2. Fix apps/status - Similar issue. Has src/status-engine.ts. Add vite.config.ts and update build script.
3. Fix apps/quantstatus - Has only 'backend' dir, no package.json visible at root. Check and ensure it has proper build config.
4. Fix apps/quanttube - Has backend/ and dist/. Verify build script works. If missing vite/next config for frontend, add it.
5. Service: services/cdc-relay - Read its src/main.ts. Ensure it has proper Kafka consumer setup, health server, graceful shutdown. Add connection retry logic if missing.
6. Service: services/ci-runner - Read and verify it starts properly with health checks.
7. Service: services/git-server - Read and verify it starts properly.
8. Service: services/matchmaking - Read and verify it has proper startup, health server, and connection handling.
9. Service: services/moderation-worker - Verify it has proper Kafka/queue consumer with dead letter handling.

10. For each service that's missing proper startup/health patterns, add: health server via @quant/health-server (already used by ws-gateway and search-indexer), graceful SIGTERM/SIGINT handling, structured pino logging, connection retry with backoff.
11. Verify all services and apps typecheck and build: pnpm turbo typecheck && pnpm turbo build
acceptance_criteria: All 4 previously-unbuildable apps now have working build configs and produce output
All 8 services have consistent patterns: health server, graceful shutdown, structured logging
pnpm turbo build succeeds for all 152 packages (was 118 before)
pnpm turbo typecheck still passes for all packages
findings: Typecheck count went from 152 to 153 (new quantstatus package). Build count went from 118 to 120 (quantstatus + quanttube now have build scripts). Pre-existing test failure in @quant/quantai (4 test files fail due to JSX parsing issues) - unrelated to this feature. The rootDir tsconfig setting causes issues when workspace packages use path aliases that resolve to source files outside the rootDir, so quantstatus and quanttube tsconfigs omit rootDir.
